title: UWEBOUTPUTFILTERS
text: UWEBOUTPUTFILTERS Specifies a comma-separated list of plug-in components that can add JavaScript to web pages generated by DSPs and USPs. UWEBOUTPUTFILTERS = ComponentName 1 { , ComponentName n } Defaults Assignment file: Application assignment file Section: [LOGICALS] Default value: None Arguments ComponentName —name of a component to be activated by Uniface when assembling a response to a browser request for a DSP or USP. If multiple components are specified, they must be separated by commas. Description An output filter is a component that processes data sent by the server to the client. For example, If you create a web output filter called PerformanceFilter add it to the application configuration: [LOGICALS] UWEBOUTPUTFILTERS=PerformanceFilter Copy Related Links Creating a Web Output Filter Plug-in Uniface provides a generic mechanism that enables you to add your own JavaScript or HTML to web pages generated from dynamic and static server pages.
